FREE TO JOIN

Join and Create your vendor account

READY TO START?

Apply in 2 minutes.

Drop your details — we'll call you back within 48 hours.

OR
Chat with us on WhatsApp →

🔒 We won't share your details. No spam. Just one call.

WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

After you sign up:

1

Verify your phone number

A quick OTP to confirm your account

2

Build your profile

Add photos, bio, and cuisine types

3

Create your first package

Set price, guests, and what's included

4

Go live on Catery

Your profile appears in customer search immediately

5

Receive your first inquiry

Most vendors get their first message within 48 hours

AFTER SIGN UP

Download the App

Download on theApp Store GET IT ONGoogle Play
